name: ClickUp Ops
description: Guarded ClickUp task, sprint, comment, and workspace operations through the agent-friendly cup CLI. Read tools return JSON automatically; all external mutations require approval.

tools.name: clickup_auth
tools.description: Verify ClickUp authentication and return the active user and workspace.

tools.name: clickup_summary
tools.description: Return a daily standup summary of completed, in-progress, and overdue work.

tools.name: clickup_assigned
tools.description: List all tasks assigned to the authenticated user, grouped by status.

tools.name: clickup_overdue
tools.description: List overdue tasks assigned to the authenticated user.

tools.name: clickup_sprint
tools.description: List the authenticated user's tasks in the active sprint.

tools.name: clickup_spaces
tools.description: List ClickUp spaces in the active workspace.

tools.name: clickup_members
tools.description: List members in the active ClickUp workspace.

tools.name: clickup_search
tools.description: Search the authenticated user's ClickUp tasks by text.

tools.name: clickup_task
tools.description: Read complete details for a ClickUp task ID, custom ID, or task URL.

task_id.description: ClickUp task ID, custom ID, or URL.

tools.name: clickup_activity
tools.description: Read task details and comments together for work context.

task_id.description: ClickUp task ID, custom ID, or URL.

tools.name: clickup_comments
tools.description: List comments on a ClickUp task.

task_id.description: ClickUp task ID, custom ID, or URL.

tools.name: clickup_subtasks
tools.description: List open subtasks beneath a ClickUp task or initiative.

task_id.description: Parent task ID, custom ID, or URL.

tools.name: clickup_tasks_by_status
tools.description: List the authenticated user's tasks matching a fuzzy status name.

status.description: Status such as in progress, review, or done.

tools.name: clickup_tasks_in_list
tools.description: List all tasks in a ClickUp list, including tasks assigned to other users.

tools.name: clickup_create_task
tools.description: Create a task in a ClickUp list.
tools.approval_reason: Creating a ClickUp task changes external project state.

tools.name: clickup_create_subtask
tools.description: Create a subtask beneath an existing ClickUp task or initiative.

parent_id.description: Parent task ID, custom ID, or URL.

tools.approval_reason: Creating a ClickUp subtask changes external project state.

tools.name: clickup_update_status
tools.description: Change a ClickUp task status using fuzzy status matching.

task_id.description: Task ID, custom ID, or URL.

tools.approval_reason: Changing task status updates external project state.

tools.name: clickup_update_priority
tools.description: Change a ClickUp task priority.

task_id.description: Task ID, custom ID, or URL.

tools.approval_reason: Changing task priority updates external project state.

tools.name: clickup_comment
tools.description: Post a Markdown comment on a ClickUp task.

task_id.description: Task ID, custom ID, or URL.

tools.approval_reason: Posting a comment communicates externally to ClickUp collaborators.

tools.name: clickup_assign
tools.description: Assign a ClickUp task to a user ID or me.

task_id.description: Task ID, custom ID, or URL.

tools.approval_reason: Assigning a task changes responsibility in ClickUp.

tools.name: clickup_delete_task
tools.description: Permanently delete a ClickUp task. Use only when explicitly requested.

task_id.description: Task ID, custom ID, or URL.

tools.approval_reason: Deleting a ClickUp task is destructive and cannot be undone.
